title: senecio lanifer
intro: Senecio lanifer, also known as woolly groundsel, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to clear mucus, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and other respiratory ailments. Senecio lanifer can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
